corrections.text: The article states Snap 'spun off a new company called Specs in January 2026.' The cited TechCrunch source says only that Snap spun off the company 'earlier this year' and does not specify a month. The spin-off itself is sourced; the specific 'January 2026' month is not supported by any cited source.

The article places quotation marks around 'revving up for the release of its wearable later this year.' The cited TechCrunch source actually reads 'revs up for the release of its wearable later this year.' The verb tense was altered inside the quotation marks; the source's exact wording is 'revs up.'
